questions.question: Simplify i³.
questions.explanation: i³ = i² · i = (-1) · i = -i. Remember that i² = -1 by definition.

questions.question: Compute (3 + 2i) + (1 - 5i).
questions.explanation: Add real parts: 3 + 1 = 4. Add imaginary parts: 2i - 5i = -3i. Result: 4 - 3i.

questions.question: What is i⁴?
questions.explanation: i⁴ = (i²)² = (-1)² = 1. Powers of i repeat every 4 terms.

questions.question: Subtract (5 + 4i) - (2 + i).
questions.explanation: Subtract real parts: 5 - 2 = 3. Subtract imaginary parts: 4i - i = 3i. Result: 3 + 3i.

questions.question: Simplify i⁶.
questions.explanation: i⁶ = i⁴ · i² = 1 · (-1) = -1. Alternatively, 6 = 4 + 2, so i⁶ has the same value as i².
